title: Ozi Self-Evolving Brief Collection — builder-validator pattern with evidence-based promotion
signal: Applied DSPy-GEPA tightening approach to Ozi brief generation: (1) Builder-validator pattern with 5 validation rules (schema compliance, cross-check accuracy, timestamp freshness, expediter consistency, teaching count sanity). (2) Refinement logging to WAI-Spoke/advisors/ozi/refinements.jsonl on validation failure. (3) Promotion gates: 3 occurrences required before promotion. (4) Escalation trigger: 3+ failures in 10 runs. System self-improves without manual intervention. Files: tools/generate_ozi_brief.py, tools/promote_brief_refinement.py, WAI-Spoke/skills/brief-validation.md.
rationale: Pattern applicable to all advisors (Ozi, Octo, Expediter, Historian). Replaces manual prompt editing with evidence-based, bounded refinement with promotion gates.
decision_reason: Category: other. Impact: 9/10. Defer until higher-priority signals processed.
